summary: Implemented Write to task promotion by creating Home-owned HomeTask records from WritingNote records, preserving the original note and adding typed Write-note origin metadata with duplicate promotion rejection.
recommended_next_reason: Stop after one destination-specific Write promotion path so protocol promotion remains a separate deliberate slice.

contract_status_changes.contract: Legacy handoff schema backfill for write-promote-to-task
contract_status_changes.before: Legacy handoff predated explicit proof, residual risk, repo cleanliness, and mirror status fields.
contract_status_changes.after: Backfilled only from the existing handoff summary, validation trail, and recorded risks; product history and proof claims were not upgraded beyond the evidence.

residual_risks: Task promotion is implemented; permanent-note and protocol promotion remain explicitly future work.
Home tasks persist typed Write-note origin metadata, but Home task detail does not yet expose a user-visible route-back affordance to the source Write note.
The new Turn into Task affordance is covered by build/domain tests, but not by screenshot/UI regression proof.
